item.title: Mustang Combo Build
item.description: We had to try this Mustang combo to see if the idea paid off. A hands-on look at the build, restoration work, and project car decisions in the garage. Did the setup come together as planned?

media:content.media:title: Mustang Combo Build
media:content.media:description: We had to try this Mustang combo to see if the idea paid off. A hands-on look at the build, restoration work, and project car decisions in the garage. Did the setup come together as planned?

item.title: #diesel #swap #restoration CAT 3126 in F-350
item.description: A CAT 3126 is running in an F-350 after a diesel swap and restoration work. The result is more unusual than expected. What do you think of the setup?

media:content.media:title: #diesel #swap #restoration CAT 3126 in F-350
media:content.media:description: A CAT 3126 is running in an F-350 after a diesel swap and restoration work. The result is more unusual than expected. What do you think of the setup?

item.title: Bus Engine Swap
item.description: A mechanic takes on a bus engine swap, showcasing the removal of the old engine and installation of a replacement. The video highlights the tools, techniques, and challenges involved in this major mechanical project. What engine swap would you like to see next?

media:content.media:title: Bus Engine Swap
media:content.media:description: A mechanic takes on a bus engine swap, showcasing the removal of the old engine and installation of a replacement. The video highlights the tools, techniques, and challenges involved in this major mechanical project. What engine swap would you like to see next?

item.title: $70 Welder Shop Test
item.description: A low-cost welder gets put to work in the shop to see how it performs during real repair and restoration tasks. What would you expect from a $70 tool?

media:content.media:title: $70 Welder Shop Test
media:content.media:description: A low-cost welder gets put to work in the shop to see how it performs during real repair and restoration tasks. What would you expect from a $70 tool?

item.title: Who’s Coming Out July 25?
item.description: A teaser hints at an upcoming announcement or special release scheduled for July 25. The video builds anticipation without revealing all the details. What do you think will be unveiled?

media:content.media:title: Who’s Coming Out July 25?
media:content.media:description: A teaser hints at an upcoming announcement or special release scheduled for July 25. The video builds anticipation without revealing all the details. What do you think will be unveiled?

item.title: Peterbilt Drag Truck Build
item.description: Follow the build of a custom Peterbilt drag truck, showcasing fabrication, performance upgrades, and the work that goes into creating a powerful competition-ready machine. Which part of the build interests you most?

media:content.media:title: Peterbilt Drag Truck Build
media:content.media:description: Follow the build of a custom Peterbilt drag truck, showcasing fabrication, performance upgrades, and the work that goes into creating a powerful competition-ready machine. Which part of the build interests you most?

item.title: The 3.9 Perkins Finally Woke Up
item.description: A few stubborn gremlins stood in the way as the little diesel came back to life. A hands-on restoration and mechanical troubleshooting session with the 3.9 Perkins. What would you check first?

media:content.media:title: The 3.9 Perkins Finally Woke Up
media:content.media:description: A few stubborn gremlins stood in the way as the little diesel came back to life. A hands-on restoration and mechanical troubleshooting session with the 3.9 Perkins. What would you check first?

item.title: Diagnosing a Triton V10 Engine
item.description: A mechanic investigates issues with a Triton V10 engine, demonstrating diagnostic techniques and troubleshooting steps to identify the problem. The video offers insight into the vehicle repair process. What engine diagnostic tip has helped you the most?

media:content.media:title: Diagnosing a Triton V10 Engine
media:content.media:description: A mechanic investigates issues with a Triton V10 engine, demonstrating diagnostic techniques and troubleshooting steps to identify the problem. The video offers insight into the vehicle repair process. What engine diagnostic tip has helped you the most?
